cypher:
MERGE (r:Rule {id:'R_URB_HEIGHT_MAX_75_V'}) SET r.text='Building(?b)^hasHeightM(?b,?h)^swrlb:greaterThan(?h,75)->violatesMaxHeight(?b,true)', r.kind='violation'
MERGE (C_Building:Class {iri:'ex:Building'}) SET C_Building.label='Building'
MERGE (DP_H:DatatypeProperty {iri:'ex:hasHeightM'}) SET DP_H.label='hasHeightM', DP_H.range='xsd:decimal'
MERGE (B_gt:Builtin {iri:'swrlb:greaterThan'}) SET B_gt.label='greaterThan'
MERGE (lit75:Literal {lex:'75', datatype:'xsd:decimal'}) SET lit75.lex='75', lit75.datatype='xsd:decimal'
MERGE (litT:Literal {lex:'true', datatype:'xsd:boolean'}) SET litT.lex='true', litT.datatype='xsd:boolean'
MERGE (r)-[:HAS_BODY {order:1}]->(a1)
MERGE (r)-[:HAS_BODY {order:2}]->(a2)
MERGE (r)-[:HAS_HEAD {order:1}]->(h1)
MERGE (a1)-[:ARG {pos:1}]->(lit75)
MERGE (a2)-[:ARG {pos:1}]->(litT)
MERGE (h1)-[:ARG {pos:1}]->(lit75)
MERGE (r:Rule {id:'R_URB_HEIGHT_MAX_75_V'}) SET r.text='Building(?b)^hasHeightM(?b,?h)^swrlb:greaterThan(?h,75)->violatesMaxHeight(?b,true)', r.kind='violation'
MERGE (C_Building:Class {iri:'ex:Building'}) SET C_Building.label='Building'
MERGE (DP_H:DatatypeProperty {iri:'ex:hasHeightM'}) SET DP_H.label='hasHeightM', DP_H.range='xsd:decimal'
MERGE (B_gt:Builtin {iri:'swrlb:greaterThan'}) SET B_gt.label='greaterThan'
MERGE (lit75:Literal {lex:'75', datatype:'xsd:integer'}) SET lit75.lex='75', lit75.datatype='xsd:integer'
MERGE (a1)-[:ARG {pos:1}]
MERGE (lit75)-[:LLEX {id:MERGE_R_URB_HEIGHT_MAX_75_V}
MERGE (litT)-[:LLEX {id:MERGEMINUS_R_URB_HEIGHT_MIN_V}
MERGE (litV)-[:LLEX {id:MERGE_R_URB_HEIGHT_MIN_V}
MERGE (litT)-[:LLEX {id:MERGEMINUS_R_URB_HEIGHT_MIN_V}
MERGE (r)-[:HAS_BODY {order:1}]
MERGE (litV)-[:MERGE_V:at most N]
MERGE (litT)-[:MERGE_T:violates at most T]
MERGE (litM:BVar {id:MERGE_M:at most M})
MERGE (litV:Lex {id:MERGE_V:at most N})
MERGE (r)-[:HAS_BODY {order:1}]
MERGE (litV:Var {MERGE_V:at most V})
MERGE (r)-[:MERGE_D:hasHead {DEP}]
